zh.lifeSummary: 當Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary於1130年出生在匈牙利托爾納托爾納時，他的父親Bela II King of Hungary22歲，母親Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary15歲。他於1146年與Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné在匈牙利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年5月31日在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年32歲，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary于1130年出生在匈牙利托爾納托爾納时，他的父亲Bela II King of Hungary22岁，母亲Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary15岁。他于1146年与Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné在匈牙利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年5月31日在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦享年32岁，埋葬在匈牙利費也艾爾澤可斯費賀瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Hazi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Muslim (mainly Pakistan): from a predominantly Urdu variant of the Arabic personal name Raḍī ‘satisfied, pleased’ (see Radi 3).
Muslim (mainly Iran): habitational name for someone from the city of Ray in Iran.

variants.name: Radi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Amin, Basem, Iyad, Kamel, Khalid, Mojtaba, Raouf, Said.
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed either with rād, rāt ‘advice, counsel’ or, in some cases, with hrād ‘quick’. Compare Rady 1.
Hungarian (Rádi): habitational name for someone from any of several places called Rád in Hungary. Compare Rady 3.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Géza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from Deza, a former territory in the center of Galicia (Spain), probably of pre-Roman origin.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary was born in 1130, in Tolna, Tolna, Hungary, his father, Bela II King of Hungary, was 22 and his mother, Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary, was 15. He married Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné in 1146, in Hungary. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 31 May 1162, in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary, at the age of 32, and was buried in Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungary.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary est né en 1130, à Tolna, Tolna, Hongrie, son père, Bela II King of Hungary, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné en 1146, à Hongrie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mai 1162, à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hongrie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary 1130 in Tolna, Tolna, Ungarn geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bela II King of Hungary 22 und seine Mutter Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary 15. Er hat 1146 in Ungarn Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Mai 1162 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn und wurde in Stuhlweißenburg, Stuhlweißenburg, Ungarn begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary è nato il nel 1130 nel Tolna, Tolna, Ungheria, il suo padre, Bela II King of Hungary, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné nel 1146, nel Ungheria. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 maggio 1162, nel Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Ungheria.

ja.lifeSummary: Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungaryが1130年にハンガリートルナトルナで生まれた時，父Bela II King of Hungaryは22歳，母Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungaryは15歳であった。1146年にハンガリーでEuphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királynéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年5月31日にハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルで32歳で死去し，ハンガリーフエジeルスズeケスフエheルvaルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary(이)가 1130년 헝가리 톨나 톨나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bela II King of Hungary(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1146년 헝가리에서 Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 5월 31일 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 헝가리 프제이e르 스즈e케스프he르브a르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary nasceu em 1130, em Tolna, Tolna, Hungria, seu pai, Bela II King of Hungary, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné em 1146, em Hungria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de maio de 1162, em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary родился в 1130 г. в местности толна, толна, Венгрия, его отцу по имени Bela II King of Hungary было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné в 1146 г. в местности Венгрия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 31 мая 1162 г. в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности сзeкесфэeрвaр, феджeр, Венгрия.

sm.from 1141 to 1162: mai le 1141 e o'o I le 1162

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Géza II Arpad Hazi of Hungary nació en 1130, en Tolna, Tolna, Hungría, su papá, Bela II King of Hungary, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Queen Jelena Vukanović Magyar királyné of Hungary, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Euphrosyne Rurik-házi Kijevi hercegnő, magyar királyné en 1146, en Hungría. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1162, en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Székesfehérvár, Fejér, Hungría.
